tier_a.label: Multiple independent sources
tier_a.description: Restaurant recommended by 2+ independent sources, or appears in both ES and EN source pools from different publishers

tier_b.label: Single qualified source
tier_b.description: Restaurant recommended by one named-author source meeting all quality criteria

tier_c.label: Auto-rejected
tier_c.description: Failed extraction-time quality checks (quote under 15 words, no specific detail)

sources.author: Miquel Hernandis
sources.writer_profile: Food writer for El Español Alicante, covering the culinary scene and restaurant landscape in the Alicante region of Spain. Miquel Hernandis contributes food guides and dining recommendations to help readers discover local restaurants and eateries. His work focuses on showcasing the diverse food culture and dining options available in the area.

sources.author: Ed Gilbert
sources.note: single-author-confirmed: About page confirms Ed Gilbert as sole author; article URL shows /2023/08/ path; no date in article body → article_date: undated
sources.writer_profile: Gourmet Gorro food writer Ed Gilbert creates comprehensive food guides for dining enthusiasts. His work focuses on restaurant discovery and culinary exploration through detailed food coverage.

restaurants.name: Nou Manolín
dishes_mentioned: bonito en escabeche con sopa de mango y fruta de la pasión
verduras de temporada con espuma de albahaca y piñones
crystal breads topped with ensalada and anchovies
restaurants.quote: En la barra se van los ojos a la gamba roja y la cigala dispuestas en forma de pirámide egipcia en grandes lebrillos con cama de hielo.
restaurants.flag_reason: open_status_check — oldest source dated 2023-04-23; verify still open before deployment

restaurants.name: Béton Brut
dishes_mentioned: ensaladilla rusa marinera con anchoa cantábrica y chips de alga
arroz con lomo alto, hongos y foie
restaurants.quote: Que sea una guerra en la que los soldados aparezcan de repente, no todos de golpe

restaurants.name: Plëgat
dishes_mentioned: tartar de salchicha de El Pinós
Sticky Toffee con chocolate, boletus y vainilla
restaurants.quote: Es el más elemental, una cucharada de carne con un pequeño aliño, pero la gracia es que a veces menos es más.

restaurants.name: La Barra del Gourmet
restaurants.quote: aquí tenemos que vender arroces, arroces buenos porque al final es lo que nos caracteriza a los alicantinos

restaurants.name: Marcel Bistró
dishes_mentioned: cassoulet con judías blancas, magret y confit de pato
terrina de foie gras con salsa de pera
restaurants.quote: Quería tener un espacio muy acogedor y para recibir a la gente como en mi casa, que sean casi amigos.

restaurants.name: Cesar Anca
dishes_mentioned: oxtail cannelloni with crispy jamon crumb
millefeuille of caramelised apple, foie gras, goats cheese and smoked cod
pork cheek with pomme puree and deep red wine sauce
restaurants.quote: Cesar Anca, which is situated just off the Explanada de España, serves some of the most creative and delicious tapas we've found in Alicante.

restaurants.name: Probar el Buen Bar
dishes_mentioned: thin oozy tortilla with caramelised onions topped with savoury sabayon
fried pork belly torreznos with garlic charged mashed potato
ensaladilla rusa with smoked eel and sweet peppers
restaurants.quote: Tucked away down a city centre side street, Probar serves lovely twists on classic tapas dishes.

restaurants.name: Bar Guillermo
restaurants.quote: A traditional tapas bar, which is located just north of the central market, Bar Guillermo was almost empty when we visited around 10pm.

restaurants.name: Cervecerías Sento
dishes_mentioned: signature lollipops with pork, ham, bechamel and tomato jam
restaurants.signature_dish: signature lollipops with pork, ham, bechamel and tomato jam
restaurants.quote: Over 30 different montaditos are on offer as well as their signature lollipops - rather filthy yet delicious whorls of pork, ham and bechamel, and tomato jam as well as slightly dry pork meatballs with a compelling satay-like almond butter.
